creator: takehiro@coral.ocn.ne.jp
text:
In article <20000105230504.GGPP806.t-mta2.odn.ne.jp@athena.shige.org>
shige@FreeBSD.org writes:

>> Please set "YES" or "yes" to USE_XPG4 when you compile at 
>> japanese/emacs20-dl-wnn6.
>> 
>> If you do so, libxpg4 will be linked to emacs-dl-20.x and emacs-20.x binaries.
>> Please try this.
>> 
I already solve my problem when I did send-pr(I built emacs-20-dl 
with USE_XPG4=yes,and replace /usr/local/bin/emacs-dl-20.4 only :-)
And I am very happy.

I would show you why I did send-pr.In most case,those who use
 emacs20-dl-wnn6 is in ja_JP.EUC locale.And they will see
warning message

Warning: locale not supported by C library, locale unchanged

It's harmless,but not desirable(FreeBSD itself supports ja_JP.EUC locale).
So,I want to be USE_XPG4=yes by default.If USE_XPG4=yes is declared in
ports/japanese/emacs20-dl-wnn6/Makefile,emacs20-dl built with USE_XPG4=yes.


>> If there is no problem, I'll close this PR. Ok?
So,I want you to consider about this problem.

Takehiro Suzuki
takehiro@coral.ocn.ne.jp
